uplink.description: fPort 2 with negative SHT and DS temperatures
uplink._note: 0xFF38=-200 -> -2.00 C; 0x0190=400 -> 40.0 %; 0xFF9C=-100 -> -1.00 C. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (TempC_SHT=-2, Hum_SHT=40, TempC_DS=-1).
